name: Salesforce
one_line: Cloud CRM and sales/Service Cloud platform.
self_serve_detail: Free Developer Edition + SalesforceDX; distributed/ISV apps need partner/security review.
api_surface: REST, SOAP, GraphQL, Bulk, Metadata - very broad

name: HubSpot
self_serve_detail: Free tier; private-app token + OAuth self-serve.

name: Pipedrive
one_line: CRM platform with broad REST API (v1/v2) + developer sandbox.
self_serve_detail: Free developer sandbox at developers.pipedrive.com; create draft app for OAuth client_id/secret or use personal API token from settings - no approval.

name: Attio
one_line: AI-native relationship/CRM platform with a flexible object-based data model.
self_serve_detail: Free plan (3 seats, 50k records, free forever); admin self-generates API key or registers OAuth app at build.attio.com - no approval.
api_surface: REST broad (records/objects, lists, notes, tasks, webhooks, SCIM) + SQL + App SDK

name: Twenty
self_serve_detail: Open-source self-host free; cloud free tier with API key.

name: Podio
self_serve_detail: Free tier includes API; OAuth app self-serve.

name: Zoho CRM
self_serve_detail: Free tier; self-service OAuth + API tokens.

name: Close
self_serve_detail: API on paid plans (trial).
blocker: Paid plan for API

name: Copper
one_line: CRM for Google Workspace with REST Developer API.
self_serve_detail: API keys fully self-serve (System settings -> API Keys); OAuth2 app registration gated (contact Copper). Needs a paid Copper account (free trial available).
api_surface: REST broad (leads, people, opportunities, activities, webhooks)

name: DealCloud
self_serve_detail: Requires an enterprise DealCloud/Intapp tenant; admin enables 'API' capability and issues API keys / OAuth2 client-credentials. No free public signup.
blocker: Requires an enterprise DealCloud/Intapp tenant (acquired via sales); admin self-enables API within tenant.

name: Zendesk
self_serve_detail: API on all plans incl. trial; token + OAuth self-serve.

name: Intercom
one_line: Customer messaging/support platform with REST API + official MCP.
self_serve_detail: Create app in Developer Hub; instantly get Bearer Access Token for your workspace; OAuth auto-approved for TEST app (no review).

name: Freshdesk
self_serve_detail: Free plan includes API key (Basic auth).

name: Front
self_serve_detail: Trial/paid; API token self-serve.
blocker: Paid plan for API

name: Pylon
one_line: B2B support/operations platform unifying Slack, Teams, email, chat into ticketing.
self_serve_detail: API token self-serve from dashboard (Settings -> API tokens) but requires an active Pylon workspace (paid, sales-led onboarding); Admin role.
api_surface: REST broad (issues, accounts, contacts, KB, webhooks); OpenAPI published
blocker: Requires an active (paid) Pylon workspace + Admin role to mint an API token.

name: LiveAgent
self_serve_detail: Free trial; API on paid plans.
blocker: Paid plan for API

name: Plain
self_serve_detail: Early-stage; request access for API key.
blocker: Request-access; no public self-serve

name: Help Scout
self_serve_detail: Trial/paid; API key + OAuth.
blocker: Paid plan for API

name: Gorgias
one_line: E-commerce helpdesk with documented REST API.
self_serve_detail: Private-app API keys self-serve (Settings -> REST API); auth HTTP Basic. Public apps need app review (gated). Needs paid Helpdesk plan (free trial).

name: Gladly
self_serve_detail: Requires a paid Gladly org; admin grants 'API User' permission and generates API tokens in the UI. No free self-serve.
api_surface: REST broad (conversations, customers, tasks, agents, webhooks)
blocker: Requires a paid Gladly tenant; admin issues API token.

name: Slack
self_serve_detail: Free; create Slack app + bot token instantly.

name: Twilio
one_line: Programmable communications (messaging, voice, verify) + official MCP.
self_serve_detail: Free 30-day trial -> Account SID + Auth Token + API keys from Console; trial limited (verified numbers); full API needs paid upgrade.

name: Zoho Cliq
self_serve_detail: Free; self-service tokens.

name: Lark (Larksuite)
self_serve_detail: Open platform; create app + credentials free.

name: Pumble
self_serve_detail: Free plan; API token self-serve.

name: Discord
self_serve_detail: Free; developer portal bot token + OAuth.

name: Telegram
self_serve_detail: Free; create bot via BotFather, get token.

name: WhatsApp Business
self_serve_detail: Dev/test: free Meta app + temporary token (no cost). Production needs Meta Business verification, permanent System User token, billing; test capped at 5 recipients.
blocker: Production needs Meta Business verification + billing; dev/test capped at temporary token + 5 test recipients.

name: Aircall
one_line: Cloud phone system with RESTful Public API.
self_serve_detail: Customer API keys self-serve (Company Settings -> API Keys) -> api_id+api_token as Basic auth. OAuth2 for partners (gated). Needs paid plan (free trial).

name: Vonage
self_serve_detail: Free account (no card); API key + secret issued in dashboard; EUR2 demo credit. Auth via Basic (key:secret) or JWT bearer.
api_surface: REST broad (Voice, Messages, Verify, Numbers, Video)

name: Google Ads
self_serve_detail: Free; developer token (basic) self-serve; standard needs ad spend.

name: Meta Ads
self_serve_detail: Free; app + system-user token; some permissions need App Review.
blocker: App Review for sensitive ad permissions

name: LinkedIn Ads
self_serve_detail: Self-create Developer Portal app (OAuth client) + verify Company Page; Advertising API access requires manual human review (slow, discretionary).
blocker: Advertising API access granted only after LinkedIn's manual application review (slow, no appeal).

name: GoHighLevel
one_line: White-label CRM/agency platform with v2 REST API + official MCP.
self_serve_detail: Free developer account yields OAuth client; calling API / Private Integration Token needs Unlimited ($297) or SaaS Pro ($497) plan; Starter lacks API.
api_surface: REST v2 broad (contacts, conversations, opportunities, calendars)
blocker: API / MCP require paid Unlimited or SaaS Pro plan (Starter lacks API access).

name: Mailchimp
self_serve_detail: Free tier; API key self-serve.

name: Klaviyo
self_serve_detail: Free tier; private API key self-serve.

name: systeme.io
one_line: All-in-one marketing/business platform with public REST API + official MCP.
self_serve_detail: API keys self-serve on free plan (Settings -> Public API keys). Auth Bearer token. Some higher-tier endpoints may need paid plan.
api_surface: REST limited-but-useful (contacts, tags, newsletters, subscriptions, webhooks)

name: Pinterest
self_serve_detail: Free developer account; some ad endpoints need approval.
blocker: App review for some ad scopes

name: Threads (Meta)
self_serve_detail: Free: create Meta app with Threads use case; in Dev mode app owners/testers exchange OAuth for tokens with NO App Review. Production advanced scopes need App Review + business verification.
api_surface: REST moderate (profile, media, publish, replies, insights)

name: SendGrid
self_serve_detail: Free tier; API key self-serve.

name: Shopify
self_serve_detail: Free Partner/dev store; custom app admin token self-serve.

name: WooCommerce
self_serve_detail: Self-hosted free; consumer key/secret (Basic/OAuth1).

name: BigCommerce
self_serve_detail: Free trial; API token + OAuth.

name: Salesforce Commerce Cloud
one_line: Enterprise headless commerce platform (B2C Commerce / SCAPI).
self_serve_detail: SCAPI free for B2C Commerce customers, but real credentials require a licensed enterprise instance via Salesforce sales/partners; public demo sandbox is read-only.
api_surface: REST very broad (SCAPI Shopper + Admin, OCAPI)
blocker: Real API credentials require a licensed B2C Commerce instance (enterprise contract); no self-serve production access.

name: Magento (Adobe Commerce)
self_serve_detail: Open-source Magento self-host free (integration tokens).

name: Squarespace
one_line: Website/commerce builder; Commerce REST APIs via API key/OAuth.
self_serve_detail: Free API key from Settings -> Developer API Keys, but Commerce APIs need paid Commerce Advanced plan; OAuth for Extensions gated behind a contact form.
blocker: Commerce API key needs paid Commerce Advanced plan; OAuth path gated behind a form.

name: Ecwid
self_serve_detail: Free store; API token self-serve.

name: Gumroad
self_serve_detail: Free; personal access token.

name: Amazon Selling Partner
self_serve_detail: Register as SP-API developer (identity verification: gov ID, business license, bank, video), request + get approved for data roles; public apps pass architecture/Appstore review. Auth via LWA OAuth2.
api_surface: REST very broad (30+ sections: orders, catalog, inventory, reports, finances)
blocker: Identity verification + role approval + (public apps) architecture/Appstore review before production; needs Amazon selling account.

name: fanbasis
one_line: Merchant-of-record payments platform (rebranding to Commas) with REST API + MCP (beta).
self_serve_detail: Seller account -> Account -> API Keys for scoped key. Public API reference browsable; QA sandbox available. Live payments need KYC/business verification.
blocker: MCP in beta; live payments need KYC/business verification.

name: DataForSEO
self_serve_detail: Free account (no card); API login + auto-generated password in API Access tab; free Sandbox + $1 trial credit.
api_surface: REST very broad (SERP, Backlinks, Keywords, On-Page, Labs)

name: SE Ranking
self_serve_detail: Paid plans; API key.
blocker: Paid plan for API

name: Ahrefs
one_line: SEO toolset API (Site Explorer, backlinks) for subscribers.
self_serve_detail: API keys in Account Settings, but API only on eligible paid plans; free account limited to test queries + 2 public endpoints.
api_surface: REST v3 broad but gated to paid; minimal free public endpoints
blocker: API + MCP require an eligible paid plan (Lite ~$119/mo+).

name: MrScraper
self_serve_detail: Signup; API key + credits.

name: Apify
self_serve_detail: Free credits; API token self-serve.

name: Firecrawl
self_serve_detail: Free tier; API key self-serve.

name: Bright Data
self_serve_detail: Free trial (card); API key + zone.

name: Sherlock
self_serve_detail: Open-source CLI; no auth (public lookups).

name: Waterfall.io
one_line: B2B enrichment/GTM API across 30+ data vendors.
self_serve_detail: API key 'provided in your contract'; docs say 'contact your account manager' / 'book a call'. No public self-serve key path.
api_surface: REST async job-based enrichment (Prospector, Contact/Company, Search)
blocker: No documented self-serve credential path; key requires a contract / sales conversation.

name: Clay
one_line: GTM data platform: people/company search, enrichment, workflows.
self_serve_detail: Self-serve 'clay-api-key' under Settings -> Account -> API keys (beta) within a Clay account (paid SaaS w/ limited free tier); API usage consumes credits.

name: GitHub
self_serve_detail: Free; PAT + OAuth apps instantly.

name: Vercel
one_line: Platform API to manage Vercel projects/deployments/domains.
self_serve_detail: Free Vercel account -> Access Token (Bearer) from dashboard, or OAuth app. Free tier sufficient.
api_surface: REST broad (projects, deployments, domains, env, teams)

name: Netlify
self_serve_detail: Free; personal access token.

name: Cloudflare
self_serve_detail: Free; API token self-serve.

name: Supabase
self_serve_detail: Free tier; anon + service keys.

name: Neo4j
one_line: Graph database platform (Cypher/HTTP API + Aura cloud).
self_serve_detail: Aura free tier (no card) yields instance creds; self-managed needs server setup. Bearer via SSO; auth can be disabled.

name: Snowflake
one_line: Cloud data warehouse (SQL + REST + Cortex AI).
self_serve_detail: Self-serve 30-day trial yields credentials; REST auth via OAuth2, key-pair JWT, PAT. Full API use needs an account (trial/paid).

name: MongoDB Atlas
self_serve_detail: Free Atlas account (M0 free tier) -> OAuth2 service account or Digest API keys from dashboard.

name: Datadog
self_serve_detail: Free trial; API + APP key.

name: Sentry
self_serve_detail: Free developer tier; auth token.

name: Notion
self_serve_detail: Free; internal integration token + OAuth.

name: Airtable
one_line: Web API to read/write Airtable base records/schema.
self_serve_detail: Free account -> Personal Access Token (/create/tokens) or OAuth integration. Free plan sufficient.

name: Linear
self_serve_detail: Free plan; API key + OAuth.

name: Jira
self_serve_detail: Free tier; API token + OAuth.

name: Asana
self_serve_detail: Free plan; PAT + OAuth.

name: Monday.com
one_line: Work OS / project management (single GraphQL API).
self_serve_detail: Free no-expiry developer account gives a personal V2 API token; OAuth 2.1 client-credentials self-serve in Developer Center - no approval.
api_surface: GraphQL single endpoint (boards, items, users, apps, automations)

name: ClickUp
one_line: PM platform with public REST API (v2) + official MCP.
self_serve_detail: Free account -> personal API token (Settings -> ClickUp API) or OAuth app. API on all plans.
api_surface: REST v2 broad (tasks, spaces, docs, time, webhooks)

name: Coda
self_serve_detail: Free; API token + OAuth.

name: Smartsheet
self_serve_detail: Personal API access token in-app (Account -> Personal Settings -> API Access) free, no approval; OAuth app via Developer Tools. Needs a Smartsheet account (free trial).

name: Harvest
self_serve_detail: Free plan; PAT + OAuth.

name: Stripe
self_serve_detail: Free; API keys instantly; Connect OAuth for platforms.

name: Plaid
self_serve_detail: Free sandbox client_id + secret instantly from Plaid Dashboard (no approval). Production access requires a separate request via Dashboard.
api_surface: REST very broad (Link, Auth, Transactions, Identity, Transfer)
blocker: Production access requires an approval request via Dashboard (instant sandbox for dev/test).

name: Binance
self_serve_detail: Free account; API key + HMAC signature.

name: Paygent Connect
one_line: Japanese payment gateway (Paygent) Connect, requires merchant onboarding.
self_serve_detail: Apply as merchant, submit notarized docs, pass per-payment-institution review; credentials issued post-contract. Sandbox + production separate applications.
blocker: Requires merchant contract + per-payment-institution review; no instant self-serve credentials.

name: iPayX
self_serve_detail: Developer signup; API key (docs present).
blocker: Validate production access

name: QuickBooks
self_serve_detail: Free developer sandbox + app; OAuth self-serve.

name: Xero
self_serve_detail: Free partner/dev account + demo company; OAuth.

name: Brex
one_line: Unified business spend platform (cards, expenses, bills).
self_serve_detail: API tokens self-serve in Brex Dashboard (Settings -> Developer) by admin, but only for approved/verified Brex business customers. Official MCP needs 'Brex in AI assistants' beta + Developer API agreement.
api_surface: REST broad (Accounting, Expenses, Payments, Travel, Webhooks)
blocker: Requires an approved/verified Brex business account to obtain tokens (customer-only).

name: Ramp
self_serve_detail: API keys self-serve in Ramp Dashboard by admins, but only for approved/verified Ramp customers (developer program + approval).
blocker: Requires an approved/verified Ramp business account to obtain API keys (customer-only).

name: PitchBook
one_line: Private-markets research data via RESTful Direct Data API (contract).
self_serve_detail: API standalone offering requiring a contract; request via Direct Data team or (clients) Platform -> Plugins & Apps. Credentials via account manager post-contract.
api_surface: REST broad (companies, funds, deals, investors) - contract-scoped
blocker: API access requires a standalone contract; no self-serve or free signup.

name: NotebookLM
one_line: Google source-grounded AI research assistant (Enterprise API).
self_serve_detail: Consumer NotebookLM has no public API. NotebookLM Enterprise API (Google Cloud) requires a GCP project with NotebookLM Enterprise enabled (paid/enterprise) + Bearer token.
blocker: No consumer public API; Enterprise API requires Google Cloud NotebookLM Enterprise enrollment (paid/enterprise).

name: Otter AI
self_serve_detail: Paid plans; MCP server available; API in higher tiers.
blocker: Paid plan for API

name: Fathom
one_line: AI meeting recorder with public REST API + official MCP.
self_serve_detail: Free fathom.video account -> user-level API key (Settings -> API Access) or OAuth app. Docs browsable publicly.
api_surface: REST read-focused (meetings, recordings, transcripts, summaries, webhooks)

name: Consensus
self_serve_detail: API access by request (early).
blocker: API access request only

name: Reducto
self_serve_detail: Free tier; API key self-serve.

name: Devin
self_serve_detail: Paid; API key + MCP server.
blocker: Paid plan; MCP available

name: higgsfield
self_serve_detail: Signup; CLI token.

name: Mermaid CLI
one_line: CLI rendering Mermaid diagrams locally; no remote API.
self_serve_detail: Install via npm; no account/credentials. Runs locally (Puppeteer/Chromium).

name: YouTube Transcript
self_serve_detail: Signup/credits; API key (paid).
blocker: Paid credits for API

name: Grain
self_serve_detail: PAT + OAuth2 + Workspace tokens self-serve in-app; API access requires a paid Grain plan (Starter+); Free excludes API. No official MCP (community only).
api_surface: REST broad (recordings, transcripts, notes, tags, webhooks)
blocker: API requires a paid Grain plan (Starter+); no official MCP.
